parameters-en.Gain: Controls the amount of distortion applied to the signal. Low Gain and high Level settings are commonly used to tighten up the signal, especially when pushing higher gain amps.
parameters-en.Tone: Controls the overall tonal balance of the distortion. Lower values are darker and higher values are brighter.
parameters-en.Level: Sets the overall level of the block. Low Gain and high Level settings are commonly used to tighten up the signal, especially when pushing higher gain amps.
